violations.description: Touchpoint-matrix violation: forward-merge of release-wt/2026-06-27-conformance-foundation into track/2026-06-27-conformance-foundation/T7-telemetry-eval conflicted on 8 internal/model/* files: anthropic.go, azure.go, bedrock.go, cli.go, google.go, oai.go, oci.go, ollama.go. T7's S24-dispatch-enrich modifies these files but the touchpoint matrix does not list them in T7's column. T2-model-layer (merged) also modified these files. violations.proposed_amendment: Add internal/model/* files to T7's column in the touchpoint matrix (index.md) as DOCUMENTED SHARED with T2, or re-group S24 and T2's model-layer work into the same track or a dependent track arrangement.
